market_context: In a trending_down regime (Nifty -0.9%, ADX 25.0), only SHORT/supply zone setups are valid. TATASTEEL scores significantly higher (53/60) with perfect trend alignment and freshness, while ITC (46/60) is a re-attempt from yesterday's missed entry but has weaker trend alignment (sideways). With only 2 setups available, both are regime-aligned SHORTs but quality varies significantly.
